description_long: This is a modern, rectangular console cabinet or sideboard featuring a sturdy metal frame with a matte gray finish and wood-textured panels. The top and bottom surfaces are flat and spacious, suitable for displaying or storing items. The front face includes two horizontally aligned doors with sleek metal handles, suggesting internal storage compartments. The wood grain pattern is consistent across all visible surfaces, giving it a cohesive and contemporary look. The open shelf at the bottom provides additional storage or display space, while the overall design is minimalist and functional. This piece would fit well in urban environments such as lobbies, offices, or apartment entryways.
description: A modern, rectangular cabinet with a metal frame, wood-textured panels, two front doors, and an open lower shelf. Its minimalist design offers both enclosed and open storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing two wood-textured doors with metal handles and an open lower shelf.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the cabinet, the thickness of the panels, and the open shelf structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain wood-textured back panel and the open lower shelf.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the side panel and open shelf.
